title: agathosma prolifera
intro: Agathosma prolifera, also known as the Cape ploughshare, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues, including flatulence and indigestion, due to its antispasmodic and carminative effects. The health benefits of Agathosma prolifera include relief from nausea and stomach cramps, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory function. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and teas, to extract its medicinal compounds and promote overall well-being.
